content.en:
At present, Ye Tian has cut off one layer of Will Pagoda, and there are still three hundred and sixty-four layers of Will Pagoda left.

He rested for a while, and after the Pagoda of Will was stable and his cultivation was stable, he began to cut off another layer of the Pagoda of Will.

The success rate of others slashing the Will Pagoda is very low, and once they fail, they will not be able to continue to slash the Will Pagoda for a long time and fuse the Will Clone.

But if it is successful every time, the speed of improvement will be very fast.

this day.

Ye Tian once again cut off a layer of Will Pagoda, and the Extreme Dao Slashing Knife condensed by the Extreme Dao Slashing Technique perfectly cut off a layer of Will Pagoda, and then was quickly condensed by Ye Tian into a will clone, and then began to merge with his body.

It was all perfect.

After fusing the two will clones, Ye Tian's strength increased a little, and he obviously felt that the will clones were unstable.

"There are gains and losses, if you don't improve, you can form a will clone, whether it's exploring or doing things, it's very convenient. But the strength is too low, and in the face of those top half-step sixfold ancestors and sixfold ancestors, even if they have a will clone, it is useless. If you really encounter an extremely terrifying enemy, even if you hide, you will be found. It's like the real mountain ancestor, it's useless to hide, but it's still discovered. Ye Tian said with emotion.

Therefore, for those half-step sixfold ancestors, they would rather improve their strength and give up their will clones.

Ye Tian didn't care about this, he had a copy body anyway, even if he didn't have a will clone, it didn't matter.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian fused one will clone after another.

After fusing nine will clones, Ye Tian's strength ushered in a huge transformation.

But after that, all of his clones of the will could not be maintained for a long time.

In terms of cultivation, he was now a top-notch half-step sixfold ancestor.

......

Time flies, and tens of thousands of years of the original domain have gradually passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already fused thirty-three will clones, and his strength was much stronger than in the past.

But when it came time to fuse the thirty-fourth clone of will, he failed!

This is also the first time to fail!

"I thought I could succeed all the time, but I didn't expect to fail this time!" Ye Tian muttered.

He also knew that fusing the will clone, in the future, the success rate would be lower and lower, and many half-step sixfold ancestors would not dare to try it easily, and would collect many precious resources to strive to increase the success rate.

This is also the reason why many half-step sixfold ancestors are unable to fuse too many will clones.

And Ye Tian has only failed until now, if the other half-step sixfold ancestors knew about it, they would definitely feel unbelievable!

"Copy!"

Ye Tian re-copied a body, so that he didn't need to repair the Will Pagoda and the damage to his body, and he would soon be able to re-slash the Will Pagoda and condense the Will Clone to fuse.

And what he paid was just some ordinary resources.

Soon, the new copy of the body was completed, and he disarmed the damaged copy body, and then slashed the Pagoda of Will again.

This time, everything went smoothly and the fusion was successful.

In the next few years, Ye Tian fused the will clone again and again, and the probability of failure became higher and higher, and he might need to copy the body several times in the future before he could succeed once.

However, this way of quickly improving his strength made Ye Tian too excited.

For him, it was easier to impact the half-step six-fold ancestor than the half-step five-fold ancestor at the beginning!

Moreover, it takes less time.

Of course, this is for him, for other half-step sixfold ancestors, every time he fuses one more will clone, the time and price he pays are unimaginable!

Fusion of sixty clones!

Fusion of seventy doppelgangers!

Fusion of eighty clones!

......

As the years passed, Ye Tian fused more and more will clones, and the number of layers of the Will Pagoda was also decreasing.

And after fusing a hundred will clones, the success rate is getting lower and lower each time.

But as long as he can succeed, Ye Tian can fuse three hundred and sixty-five will clones, and when the time comes, his strength will increase to such a terrifying level, maybe he can kill the weaker Sixfold Ancestor!

At this time, the Void Fang Holy Ancestor didn't know how terrifying Ye Tian's strength had been, and it was estimated that at most they thought that Ye Tian had fused several will clones, and that was all.

this day.

Somewhere in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, a purple light triggered a vision of heaven and earth, directly attracting the attention of countless primordial ancestors.

"It's ...... Hongmeng Purple Light!"

The Void Fang Holy Ancestor's gaze saw that purple light through the layers of void, and he was immediately shocked.

Immediately.

He shuttled to that place, vowing to compete for this Hongmeng purple light.

And the Shangling Holy Ancestor and many other half-step sixfold ancestors also came here, and they also wanted to snatch the Hongmeng purple light.

After a while, there were many half-step six-fold ancestors and five-fold peak ancestors here, all staring at Hongmeng Purple Light with their eyes fixed.

"I didn't expect that my Upper Spirit Origin Domain would give birth to Hongmeng Purple Qi !!"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said excitedly.

The other people's faces were the same, a little crazy, but then nervous.

Hongmeng purple qi is just one, and there are a lot of half-step sixfold ancestors who need it!

Hongmeng Purple Qi is the same as the Light of Taixuan, it can help impact the Sixfold Ancestor, and the effect of Hongmeng Purple Qi is even better, using Hongmeng Purple Qi to break through the Sixfold Ancestor, the success rate will be higher.

"Hongmeng Purple Qi has not yet been completely conceived, but it should not be long before it can be truly conceived!" said the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor.

At this time, the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor gritted his teeth and said, "Everyone, how about this Hongmeng Purple Qi to me, I am willing to pay any price!"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor smiled and said, "Upper Spirit Saint Ancestor, my Endless Saint Ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate also needs Hongmeng Purple Qi!"

Endless Holy Ancestor!

As soon as he heard this name, the face of the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor changed, although the Endless Holy Ancestor had not yet come, it was only a thought that he could come.

If the Endless Saint Ancestor competed for Hongmeng Purple Qi, he had no hope.

However, he still didn't want to give up.

So, the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor said: "Void Tooth Holy Ancestor, your Void Tooth Holy Sect's Endless Saint Ancestor itself has a fifty percent hope of impacting the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, even if it fails once, it will inevitably become a Sixfold Origin Ancestor several times, there is no need to compete for Hongmeng Purple Qi!"

"Can't I use it?" Hehe, although I haven't reached the level of impacting the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, I can keep the Hongmeng Purple Qi for the first time and use it later!"

For a treasure like Hongmeng Purple Qi, any half-step sixfold ancestor wanted it, and so did he.

No matter what the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor exchanged, no half-step Sixfold Ancestor would be willing to exchange it.

Time passed slowly, and this Hongmeng purple qi was gradually about to be conceived.

this day.

Hongmeng purple gas was completely born.

And at this moment, a majestic figure tore through the barrier of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain and descended here.

"Changbai Daozu !!!"

The faces of the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor and the other half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors changed drastically.

This one is here!
